prompt:
A clean developer workstation scene showing a laptop with a code editor-like layout, a terminal-like pane, and a file-tree-like sidebar—rendered as abstract shapes and lines with no readable text. Nearby are a small stack of sticky notes, a USB cable, and a simple repo-folder icon printed on a card, conveying “synced repo, dependencies installed, caches warmed” without relying on words.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk desk aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic materials, no brand logos, and no readable text anywhere on screens. Keep the composition uncluttered and focused on the concept of a ready-to-test local project checkout.
